# Pubky Documentation

> Pubky is an open protocol for key-based, censorship-resistant web applications. It provides identity via public keys, data storage on homeservers, and discovery via the Mainline DHT — all over simple HTTP/REST APIs.

## Quick Start

- [TL;DR](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/tldr.md): 30-second overview of the Pubky protocol and ecosystem
- [Overview](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/overview.md): Welcome page and high-level introduction to the Pubky Knowledge Base
- [Getting Started](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/getting-started.md): Setup guide for users and developers, with paths for each audience
- [Architecture](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/architecture.md): System architecture overview showing identity, discovery, storage, and application layers
- [The Vision of Pubky](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/the-vision-of-pubky.md): Long-term vision for decentralizing identity, social coordination, and finance
- [Comparisons](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/comparisons.md): How Pubky compares to Nostr, Bluesky, Farcaster, IPFS, and other protocols
- [Glossary](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/glossary.md): Quick reference for key terms used throughout the Pubky ecosystem
- [FAQ](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/faq.md): 63+ frequently asked questions about Pubky Core, philosophy, and usage

## Key Concepts

- [Censorship](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/concepts/censorship.md): Why censorship is inevitable on centralized platforms and how Pubky addresses it
- [Credible Exit](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/concepts/credible-exit.md): Ability to leave a platform without losing data, identity, or connections
- [Semantic Social Graph](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/concepts/semantic-social-graph.md): Tagged relationships, weighted connections, and user-controlled filtering for discovery

## Pubky Core

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/introduction.md): Open protocol combining PKARR with conventional web technologies for decentralized apps
- [ELI5](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/eli5.md): Simple analogy-based explanation of Pubky Core
- [API Reference](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/api.md): Complete RESTful HTTP API specification for Homeserver data storage and retrieval
- [Authentication](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/authentication.md): Decentralized auth using Ed25519 keys, capabilities, and signed AuthTokens
- [Homeserver](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/homeserver.md): Independent data stores providing key-value storage over HTTP with public/private data
- [SDK](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/sdk.md): Client libraries for Rust, JavaScript, React Native, iOS, and Android
- [Security Model](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/security-model.md): Threat landscape, trust assumptions, and security design of the platform

## PKARR

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/introduction.md): Public-Key Addressable Resource Records — self-issued public keys as sovereign domains
- [Why PKARR?](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/why-pkarr.md): Motivation behind PKARR addressing distributed semantics, databases, and discovery
- [Architecture](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/architecture.md): Components, data formats, clients, and relays in the PKARR system
- [Getting Started](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/getting-started.md): How to publish and resolve resource records using PKARR
- [ELI5](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/eli5.md): Simple explanation of PKARR and Mainline DHT
- [Expectations](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/expectations.md): What to expect from PKARR in terms of performance and guarantees

## Pubky Apps

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/introduction.md): Decentralized social media application built on Pubky Core as a reference implementation
- [ELI5](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/eli5.md): Simple explanation of Pubky App — user-controlled social networking
- [App Specs](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-specs.md): Shared data model specifications and validation rules for the Pubky social app ecosystem

### App Architectures

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/introduction.md): Overview of architectural patterns for apps built on Pubky Core
- [Client-Homeserver](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/client-homeserver.md): Direct client-to-homeserver architecture for simple apps
- [Custom Backend](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/custom-backend.md): Middleware backend with indexer and aggregator for complex data processing
- [Global Aggregators](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/global-aggregators.md): Centralized aggregation layer collecting events from multiple homeservers

### Indexing and Aggregation

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/introduction.md): Backend components — aggregators, indexers, and web servers
- [Aggregator](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/aggregator.md): Gatekeepers that filter and collect data from homeservers
- [Indexer](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/indexer.md): Normalizes and transforms aggregated data into a unified searchable view
- [Pubky Nexus](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/pubky-nexus.md): Production-grade indexing and aggregation service powering Pubky App social features
- [Web Server](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/web-server.md): Backend services for feeds, search, identity, and payments

### Reference App

- [Pubky Client](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/introduction.md): User-facing PWA for interacting with the Pubky social network
- [pubky.app](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/pubky-app.md): Web portal and flagship social feed for the Pubky ecosystem
- [Bookmarks](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/bookmarks.md): Privately save posts for later reference
- [Layouts](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/layouts.md): Customizable column, grid, and list UI layouts for feeds
- [Notifications](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/notifications.md): Alerts for mentions, replies, and other social interactions
- [Perspectives](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/perspectives.md): Saved custom-filtered views with tags, weights, and layout preferences
- [Posts](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/posts.md): Core content type supporting text, media, tags, mentions, and links
- [Profiles](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/profiles.md): User identity pages displaying public key, bio, posts, and social connections
- [Search](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/search.md): Traditional search capabilities alongside tag-based filtering
- [Tags](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/tags.md): Free-text labels anyone can assign to users or posts, powering the semantic social graph
- [Trends](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/trends.md): Statistical views and leaderboards of trending posts, tags, and users

## Technologies

- [Key Pair](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/key-pair.md): Ed25519 public/private key pairs used for identity and authentication
- [Distributed Hash Table](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/dht.md): Decentralized key-value store for efficient distributed data retrieval
- [Mainline DHT](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/mainline-dht.md): BitTorrent-proven DHT with 10M+ nodes used as foundation for PKARR
- [DNS](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/dns.md): Domain Name System fundamentals and its role in Pubky
- [DNS over HTTPS](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/doh.md): Encrypted DNS queries for secure PKARR address resolution
- [HTTPS](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/https.md): Encrypted HTTP communication using TLS/SSL
- [PKDNS](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pkdns.md): DNS server resolving PKARR public-key domains via the Mainline DHT
- [HTTP Relay](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/http-relay.md): Relay service for forwarding encrypted AuthTokens during authentication flows
- [Homegate](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/homegate.md): Homeserver signup gatekeeping via SMS verification or Lightning payments
- [Pubky Ring](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-ring.md): Mobile key manager and identity app for iOS and Android
- [Pubky CLI](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-cli.md): Command-line tool for managing homeservers, testing, and automation
- [Pubky Docker](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-docker.md): Docker Compose stack for running the complete Pubky ecosystem locally
- [Pubky Explorer](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-explorer.md): Web-based file browser for exploring public data on homeservers
- [Pubky Backup](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-backup.md): Desktop app for maintaining local copies of homeserver data
- [Pubky Moderation](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-moderation.md): Content moderation service for homeserver operators using Checkstep
- [Pubky Noise](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-noise.md): Noise Protocol implementation for encrypted peer-to-peer communication
- [Jeb AI Bot](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/jeb-pubky-ai-bot.md): AI-powered bot providing summaries and fact-checking on the Pubky network
- [Paykit](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/paykit.md): Decentralized payment protocol for Bitcoin and Lightning (work in progress)

## Community

- [Contributing](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/contributing.md): Guide for contributing to Pubky documentation, code, and community
- [Troubleshooting](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/troubleshooting.md): Common issues and solutions for PKARR, homeservers, Docker, and more
